customer.description: Parent company for the payer (e.g. Centene, Cigna, Humana, CVS Health)

customer_segment.description: Whether customer operates regionally or nationally: National, Regional

blues_indicator.description: Y = payer affiliated with BCBS network, N = not

idn_yn.description: Y = payer is part of an Integrated Delivery Network, N = not. Present in all LODs as a mandatory field.

region.description: Geographic region based on final_state: MidWest, NorthEast, South, West, Unknown

final_state.description: Canonical state code (ZZ = unmapped). Derived from crosswalk: discrete_state → payer_state, else NPI→state, else ZZ

provider_id.description: Provider identifier for the claim line

clusters.description: Time dimension columns — rolling 12-month periods and quarters

period_indicator.description: Rolling 12-month window: P = most recent 12mo, P_lag1 = prior 12mo, P_lag2 = 2 years ago

period_label.description: Formatted period range string (e.g. "Q2'24-Q1'25"). Use as x-axis for trend charts.

quarter.description: Calendar quarter: Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4

quarter_end_month.description: Last month of the quarter in YYYYMM format (e.g. 202503)

latest_full_year.description: Latest year with complete data (usually current_year - 1)

minimum_year.description: Earliest year in the dataset (start of 3-year window)

min_invoice_date.description: First invoice date for the payer (used for same_store calculation)

clusters.description: Claim classification columns — type, product, line of business, solution

claim_type.description: Single-letter claim type: P/F/A=Professional, O/S=Outpatient, I=Inpatient

product_type.description: Derived from claim_type: Professional, Outpatient, Inpatient

line_of_business.description: Insurance type: Commercial, Dual, Medicaid, Medicare

solution.description: Rule engine: PPM (Payment Policy Management), CV (Coding Validation), CPR (Claim Pattern Review), FWA (Fraud Waste & Abuse, Aetna only)

status.description: Payer status from crosswalk: Current, Retired, or '-'

same_store.description: 1 = payer continuously active ≥90% of 36-month window with min_invoice_date before window start

clusters.description: Clinical classification — BETOS, CPT, ICD, specialty, place of service

betos_category.description: RBCS category: Anesthesia, DME, E/M, Imaging, Other, Surgeries, Test, Treatment

betos_subcategory.description: RBCS subcategory (52 values): Behavioral Health Services, Chemotherapy, Office/Outpatient Services, etc.

betos_family.description: RBCS family (180 values): Arthroplasty - Hip, Blood Count, Office Visits, etc.

betos_major_ind.description: Whether procedure is in Major Category grouping

cpt_code.description: 5-digit procedure code (Level1 CPT or Level2 HCPCS), zero-padded

cpt_desc.description: Short description of the CPT/HCPCS code

icd1_grp_desc.description: ICD-10 diagnostic group description (249 values): Back Pain, Diabetes, Asthma, etc.

pos_desc.description: Place of service description: Office, Telehealth, Inpatient Hospital, Outpatient Hospital, ER, ASC, Home, Clinics, Independent Lab, All Others

spec_desc.description: Provider specialty description (151 values): CARDIOLOGY, BEHAVIORAL HEALTH, etc.

bill_type.description: 4-digit CMS Type of Bill Code. 2nd=facility type, 3rd=care type, 4th=sequence

los.description: Level of service for E&M codes: 1-5 based on CPT code mapping, NULL for non-E&M

enm_category.description: E&M whitepaper category: Office_Visits, ER_Visits_99281-99285, Inpatient_99221-99223, Observation, Eye_Visits, etc.

clusters.description: Binary indicator flags for subsetting data (SUM PART only — financial queries)

behavioral_health_indicator.description: 1 = BH claim (BETOS subcategory='Behavioral Health Services' OR ICD starts with F OR BH specialty OR POS 52/53/57). Use for FINANCIAL queries.

telehealth_indicator.description: 'Telehealth' or 'Miscellaneous'. Derived from modifiers G0/GQ/GT/95 or POS 02/10.

medical_drugs_indicator.description: 1 = CPT code is in medical drugs list. Use for FINANCIAL queries.

dnb_indicator.description: 1 = BETOS subcategory is Injections/Infusions, Drugs via DME, Chemotherapy, or Anesthesia

enm_indicator.description: 1 = BETOS category is E/M. WARNING: this column has known data issues — prefer filtering with "betos_category" = 'E/M' instead.

sepsis_indicator.description: 1 = ICD-10 code is sepsis (A40.x, A41.x, P36.x)

recode_10.description: 1 = E/M CPT code was recoded (cpt_code != rec_cpt), 0 = not recoded, NULL = non-E/M

clusters.description: Count-part indicator flags for filtering claim/member counts (COUNT PART only)

behavioral_health_indicator_cm.description: '1' = this count row is for BH claims subset. Use with level_of_detail rows for BH utilization.

medical_drugs_indicator_cm.description: '1' = this count row is for medical drugs subset.

telehealth_indicator_cm.description: '1' = this count row is for telehealth subset.

default_indicator_cm.description: '1' = default (ALL claims, no BH/telehealth/medical_drugs filter). Use as the denominator for claims per 1000 members.

level_of_detail.description: Aggregation granularity for count rows. 30 values: period, period_lob, period_lob_prod, quarter, quarter_lob, etc. NULL in SUM PART rows.

claim_count.description: Distinct claim count at the level_of_detail granularity. Only meaningful when level_of_detail IS NOT NULL.

member_count.description: Distinct member count. ONLY available at: period, period_lob, quarter, quarter_lob levels. 0 at finer grains.

clusters.description: Financial measures — paid, savings, volume (SUM PART only, level_of_detail IS NULL)

paid.description: Non-bypassed paid amount (after copay/coinsurance/deductible, claims that went through rule engine)

gpv.description: Gross Payment Variance — total invoiced savings for original lines (non-bypassed only)

npv.description: Net Payment Variance — net savings (orig_pv + adj_pv, non-bypassed only)

adjustments.description: Invoiced payment variance for adjusted records (appeals + overturns, non-bypassed only)

bypass_spends.description: Paid amount for bypassed lines only

allowed_amount.description: Maximum allowed amount for the procedure

allowed_units.description: Maximum allowed units for the procedure

clusters.description: Line count measures (SUM PART only, level_of_detail IS NULL)

non_bypassed_lines.description: Lines that went through the rule engine (denominator for edit rate)

edited_lines.description: Lines that were edited/hit by rules (numerator for edit rate)

bypassed_lines.description: Lines that were bypassed (not processed by rule engine)

clusters.description: Rule and policy columns — decision points, medical policies

dp_key.description: Decision Point Key for the rule that edited the line

dp_key_desc.description: Description of the Decision Point Key rule

medical_policy.description: Medical Policy title for the rule (126 distinct values)

policy_package_indicator.description: Multiple policy packages the rule is associated with

policy_collection.description: Simplified policy grouping: AMA, Behavioral Health, CMS, COVID-19, Laboratory, Other Policies, Telehealth Services, Waste & Abuse
